full_description: FocusFlow is a productivity app designed to help you stay focused and avoid distractions. It utilizes techniques like the Pomodoro timer, which works in 25-minute focused intervals, and website blocking to keep you on track. The app provides a minimalistic and customizable interface, allowing you to create an optimal work environment tailored to your needs. With FocusFlow, you can prioritize tasks, set goals, and track your progress, all while minimizing digital distractions. Key features include: customizable Pomodoro sessions, website blocking, task prioritization, goal setting, and progress tracking. Download FocusFlow to enhance your productivity and achieve your goals.
